name: Bodyweight Squat
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly out. Extend arms forward for balance. Brace your core and push your hips back as if sitting into a chair. Lower until your thighs are at least parallel to the floor, keeping your chest up and back straight. Drive through your heels to return to standing.
safety_notes: If you feel knee pain, limit your depth. Use a chair or box as a target to control depth. Keep your feet flat throughout the movement.
